title: Question: Clearing packed array
body:
---


Author Name: **Julius Baxter** (@juliusbaxter)
Original Redmine Message: 926 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hi

I've come across an issue where Verilator doesn't like clearing packed arrays. Eg:

```
module TestCase(
		input Rst,
		input Clk
		);
parameter N = 4;
logic [N-1:0][31:0] ThePackedArray;
    
always @(posedge Clk)
    if (Rst)
      begin
        ThePackedArray <= '0;
      end
    
endmodule

```

I get:

 %Error: testcase.sv:11: Unsupported: Assignment between packed arrays of different dimensions

This works fine on Cadence ncsim.

This appears to be similar to other bugs which are attempting to assign arrays of equal dimensions but with one being packed and the other not. I'm not sure if this is entirely the same thing, though. What do you think?

Thanks
